changelog: NEW: $40 CAD / year CDN Proxy Fee lock screen for Canadian users. After Xtream login the app generates a unique 8-digit Order ID and asks you to send $40 CAD via Interac e-Transfer to Hushtv.info@gmail.com with the Order ID in the Message field. The app auto-unlocks within 1-2 minutes of the bank confirming the auto-deposit.
License is tied to your Xtream username, NOT the device — pay once, login on as many devices as you like.
Annual renewal: when your license expires the same lock screen appears for re-payment.
